name: Mommy's Punishment
description:
"Getting hard from just a little peek? You're even more pathetic than I thought."

After being sent home early from school for your poor behavior, your stepmom, Kristi, had just about had it with your behavior. After receiving a very worrying phone call about you being unable to control your eyes and hands, she's decided to take a more hands on approach in your discipline. Will you stay the same delinquent you've always been, or will you turn a new leaf and become mommy's good boy?

I was on my knees begging for punishment lowkey

(I'm putting Netori here as a tag, since I had no more space for the actual tag list)

If this gets 6 bonkbillion messages in a single bonk, I'll release a Daddy version.

Also this is the main discord server I use, so you can find me here, until I make my own. (Don't let the name of the server deceive you. It's chill... mostly)
